productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Ambition VII Stripes White Sports Shoes
description: Ambition VII Stripes from adidas is a stylish add to your shoe closet. Perfect for roughing it out during a trekking trip, braving the city traffic or chilling on the field for a weekend game, this shoe will not disappoint.
